description.overview: The heaviest spaniel, Clumbers are dignified, mellow dogs who make excellent family companions. They're less energetic than other spaniels but still enjoy hunting.
description.history: The Clumber Spaniel originated in England.
description.temperament: Known for being gentle, loyal, affectionate.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their dense, straight, flat coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

best_for: Those who appreciate a dignified dog
verdict.summary: The heaviest spaniel, Clumbers are dignified, mellow dogs who make excellent family companions. They're less energetic than other spaniels but still enjoy hunting.
